notes: Stock UT99 (bymatej/ut99-server: original 436 + Epic bonus packs, no third-party mods). Same two-transport control as the modded build — GameSpy reads on the query port (game port + 1), UWeb admin-console writes on 5580 (HTTP Basic auth) — verified live: `servertravel`, `say`, bot commands and the console all work. Runs genuinely stock: `rules` reports mutators=None and only Botpack gametypes are available (no MonsterHunt/ChaosUT/BunnyTrack), so change_gametype is limited to stock classes and there is no `modData` catalogue. The map-change verb is `servertravel`, not `switchlevel`. The query port exposes no IPs. ADMIN SURFACE — what is PROVEN vs what is NOT. The UWeb console runs `Level.ConsoleCommand`. PROVEN WORKING by observed effect: `servertravel` (map changes), `set`/`get` (value reads back), `say` (appears as 'Admin:'). UNVERIFIED: `Kick`, `AddBots`, `KillAll`, `Pause`, `Mutate` — the UT99 source says these are `exec function`s on PlayerPawn and the web console has no PlayerPawn, so they may silently do nothing; but this could NOT be confirmed, because bots do not spawn on an empty server (UT99 waits for a human before starting the match) and GameSpy `numplayers`/`\players\` do not count bots anyway. They are kept, flagged `unverified`. ⚠️ CRITICAL: the console gives NO feedback. A pure garbage command returns the SAME '(command sent; web admin returned no console output)' as `servertravel`. So that reply is NEVER evidence a command worked — ALWAYS confirm by effect (a follow-up query). NOTE: UE1 `set` writes the CLASS DEFAULT, so a cvar takes effect on the NEXT map — pair it with `change_map` to apply it now.

commands.name: change_map
commands.description: Load a map, keeping the current game type. Map prefix must match the running type (CTF-* in CTF, DM-* in DeathMatch).

map.description: Map name without extension, e.g. CTF-Face or DM-Deck16][

commands.name: change_gametype
commands.description: Load a map AND switch the game type. Stock Botpack gametypes only — this build ships no mod gametypes.

map.description: Map name without extension, e.g. DM-Deck16][

gametype.description: Stock game type class: Botpack.CTFGame (CTF), Botpack.DeathMatchPlus (DM), Botpack.TeamGamePlus (Team DM), Botpack.Domination, Botpack.Assault, Botpack.LastManStanding.

player.description: Exact player name as shown by the players query.

commands.name: add_bots
commands.description: Add bots to the current match.

commands.name: remove_bots
commands.description: Remove all bots from the current match.

commands.name: say
commands.description: Broadcast an admin message to everyone on the server (shown as 'Admin: <message>').

commands.name: pause
commands.description: Toggle pause on the current match.

queries.name: server_info
queries.description: Server name, current map, game type and player count, from the GameSpy \info\ query.

queries.name: rules
queries.description: Match settings from the GameSpy \rules\ query. On this stock build `mutators` is normally None.

queries.name: players
queries.description: Human players (name, score, ping, team) from the GameSpy \players\ query. Bots do NOT appear, and a player drops from the list while dead/respawning. The query port exposes no IPs.

cvars.name: time_limit
cvars.description: Match time limit in minutes. Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: goal_team_score
cvars.description: Captures needed to win (CTF). Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: frag_limit
cvars.description: Frags needed to win (DM). Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: friendly_fire
cvars.description: Team-damage scale, 0.0 = off, 1.0 = full. Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: min_players
cvars.description: Bots are spawned to fill the server up to this count. Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: max_players
cvars.description: Player slots. Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: use_translocator
cvars.description: Translocator on/off (True/False). Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).

cvars.name: novice_mode
cvars.description: Easier bots (True/False). Takes effect on the next map (UE1 `set` writes the class default).
